_readme: Single source of truth for FDI build MODULES (theme-presets.json pattern). A module is one composable feature of a build. Consumed by: (1) the hub menu UI (which modules to offer), (2) the skill (which optional modules to generate — see SKILL.md 'Modules'), (3) the engine (registry-aware gates + build-summary.modules). Adding a feature = a folder/phase + one line here, nothing else. BACKWARD-COMPAT IS SACRED: a build with no config.json.modules[] generates every default:true module = today's exact behavior, forever.

tiers.core: Always generated. Hard-fails the build if missing (walkthrough + dashboard are the product).
tiers.optional: Generated only when selected (or default:true and no explicit selection). If skipped or its generator fails, the build DEGRADES to a designed empty state and still ships — one feature can never tank the 1.5h build.
